headline: Technical Product Manager with 12+ years in Fintech, Insurtech
summary: Specialising in Digital Transformation and Innovation for companies looking to reinvent their product line or business focus.  I am a passionate entrepreneur with experience in building B2B products, internal tools, API's and brand creation. Consulting for fintech and e-commerce startups, I am able to utilise my technical and operational expertise to quickly deliver on projects requiring a wide range of skillsets. When a company decides to embark on an innovation strategy I serve as needed from ideation to scale, acting as Product Owner or Operations Lead while recruiting new members as the strategy unfolds.  Usually reporting directly to a board of management or steering committee, I deliver easy to digest executive summaries to aid in the review process, from organising and gathering client requirements to explaining market trends and retrospectives on what has been successful during development, what has failed, and what opportunities lay ahead.  I have extensive experience in API design, development, documentation and testing for both large corporate and startup use cases. For startups the focus is on speed of software development, incorporating off the shelf solutions and versioning to move quick and test product variations often with a few large customers to start. Large corporations require standardisation through API Governance and refined global naming structures that allow for API's to be clearly segmented based on the customer handling the integration. In all cases clear to understand documentation is crucial to both commercialise and integrate the API efficiently. I prefer to be included/responsible for all aspects of the API to deliver the best result for the end-user, our customers development team.  I spend my free time enhancing my technical skills through small tech projects such as home automation and learning courses from AWS or Google which allows me to better communicate and relate to developers and their needs.

experience.title: Product Owner
experience.description: - Creation of a new innovation platform to run experiments to solve common problems faced by mid-sized exporters. - - Prototyping real product ideas using Figma Make and Lovable for user testing and efficient knowledge transfer of business logic to development teams - - Evaluation and testing of partner API's in Postman for writing detailed work tickets in JIRA saving discovery time for developers - Migration of 3 documentation platforms to a single Confluence installation for the product and tech departments. - Improved the integration of trade financing documents in the workflow app Manager via a new Payment Advice field matching experience for uploaded documents. - Automated release notes using Jira automation scripting for internal and external audiences.

experience.title: API Specialist
experience.description: Development, testing and deployment of the Bright Energy Developer Hub for white-label utility clients, allowing their end customers to login and access their white-label mobile apps.  - Created a product road map after an efficient discovery process by reviewing existing code base, documentation and client developer experience. - Created an continuous development workflow for Bright Energy developers/product owners maintaining the developer hub and all underlying documentation sources. - Created custom, OAS 3.1 definitions for both Bright-Kit and Bright-API focused on proper naming schema's, inheritance, polymorphism and stored in a team accessible Github repo for platform independent collaboration. All elements of the Open API definition were re-worked to prepare for international sales. - Quickly deployed an improved customer developer experience using Readme.com SaaS which sourced content from a linked git repository for tiered permission control of content. - Created a public Postman Team Profile and Workspace with collections sourced from the same linked git repository. This enabled self-service testing of utility clients API's removing the dependency of completing the white-label deployment to test.

experience.title: Product Owner
experience.description: Development, testing and deployment of the E-commerce API suite for BNPL clients.  - Built an entirely new set of API's to enable e-commerce clients to be insured for Buy Now Pay Later payment schemes. - Relaunched an improved version of our API Documentation portal with in-depth developer guides to simplify the integration process. - Created an accompanying Postman Collection and Mock Server to enable developers to do integration testing of their test and production accounts. - Helped employees to learn about the project through a comprehensive internal project documentation in Confluence - Coordinated multiple scrum teams from different departments using Jira to deliver new product features dependent on upstream services  Development, testing and deployment of Single-Invoice.co API version 3 for invoice insurance customers.  - Simplified the integration flowchart for developers by redesigning the API to be a linear flow with unique end states. - Reduced time-to-live by creating a streamlined on-boarding experience for developers with in-depth guides from Getting Started to Production launch.

experience.title: Product Owner
experience.description: Tradelock Invoice Insurance web app for SME's in the UK.  - Brought to market a new method for SME's to buy credit insurance for their company via connecting their accounting system and selecting invoices or buyers to insure. - Continuously added new accounting systems to allow new SME's access to purchase insurance. - Built new features and A/B tested different pricing options based on User Interviews of existing customers. This improved our on-boarding success rate and conversion rate inside the web app. - Solidified our position in the market by attending the largest insurance and accounting conventions in the UK. - Increased distribution of our product through new partnerships which could never been utilised in the past by the company without our product. - Proved that a machine learning model can decrease risk significantly with only a small lost in sales. Created a tuned supervised machine learning model with a data scientist that connected directly to our database and trained on anonymised accounting data, historical purchasing data and insurance events. - Improved status reporting and transparency towards our steering committee by creating automated reporting dashboards using Google Data Studio. We never needed to create a sales/marketing report and members could review the live dashboard anytime. - Successfully prepared for and passed a penetration test with no major security or product issues discovered.

experience.title: Head Of Operations
experience.description: As a founding member of the Credable team these are my main duties as Head of Operations:  - Product Owner of the Credable product suite working directly with developers and designers to provide an innovative digital credit insurance experience for SME's. - API and Developer documentation using Readme platform with live demo capabilities - - Web App - User focused insurance portal with BankID login (Sweden) identification and signing. - - Insure API - Scrive signing of insurance policy PDF's and delivery of credit insurance per invoice. - Evaluation, vetting, testing, validation and management of service providers and API's supplementing the Credable experience ranging from up to the minute currency exchange rates, multiple payment gateways serving region specific payment methods, infrastructure dependent micro-services, all 3rd party services serving marketing, design, communication and delivery  - Advisor for development of company group wide services to supplement our digital product suite such as KYC, company data acquisition, e-signing and payments - Product Management and advising for product owners in other internal innovation projects within the group - Enabling and curating partnerships with financial and data companies such as e-invoicing, accounting systems, factoring and invoice discounting platforms, banks and collection agencies who all play a role within company supply chains - Supporting legal and compliance departments to deliver new commercial contracts and insurance policies to match our product suite within the EU

experience.title: Technical Project Manager
experience.description: -  Project Management for small to medium sized agile teams working in digital products for enterprise level clients. Main project was Credable for Allianz Trade. - Stakeholder management across multiple organisation levels. - Direct support to developers, designers and strategists to minimise roadblocks to promote a delivery focused workflow.

Using HTML 5, JavaScript. Hosted on Azure. Features: Basic Login, Zendesk integration, session control, interactive graphs, custom date ranges, monthly reports.

experience.title: SEO Specialist

Providing quality keyword tracking and link reporting through the LinkBird API and LinkBird reporting tool. Setting up Sitemaps using the Semantic keyword method to best attract organic search and lower the cost of paid search to client websites.

experience.description: Project requirements, design, and production of payment products. Incorporating visual responses (color change, notifications, focusing) per event to guide customers through the payment flow. Managing the implementation of smart layers built underneath the interface to encourage users to provide valid input.  •	Agile Project Management to incorporate customer feature requests with production goals, plan epics, summarize technical documentation for development and adjust the company roadmap while maintaining a specific timeline not to inhibit marketing and PR efforts. •	Integration and partner liaison to negotiate working contracts to establish development ready environment for the testing and implementation of payment orientated services.

experience.description: •	Client acquisition and account management that produced major growth within a startup. Customer base grew from 10 to 200 clients under 8 months.  •	Vertical marketing analysis and reporting for startup of nine people.  Reports crucial to pivoting choices and product production pipeline. •	Agile Project Management using Pivotal Tracker working directly with developers to prioritize customer requests and lobby for feature ranking in product backlog. •	Promotion of product awareness within target markets by authoring blog articles on company website.

experience.title: Division Manager
experience.description: Sales management of two labels for the company's largest account. Overseeing business analytics and sales personnel.   •	Trained, mentored and managed 10 Sales Representatives to operate a B2C model of sales in a highly competitive wine industry. •	Consulted directly with winery CFO on market-based decisions to promote accelerated growth amongst multiple competitors with supplementary products using trend analysis. •	Managed major sales accounts to increase product visibility, expand sales region, provide on-site sales training and advise on marketing strategies based on consumer sales data. •	Tripled Sales Revenue within 20 months and developed integral industry contacts to ensure better supply chain management.

education.field: Degree focuses on Investments, Institutions and I pursued additional study in Decision Sciences.

projects.name: Credable API
projects.description: Welcome to the Credable API Documentation. You'll find comprehensive guides and documentation to help you start working with Credable® as quickly as possible.

projects.name: Single-Invoice.co v3 Documentation
projects.description: A redesigned version of our popular v2 with a focus on better endpoint naming and comprehensive integration guides.

projects.name: E-commerce API Suite
projects.description: Our team was tasked with creating an API for BNPL providers looking to offset their risk for E-commerce B2B applications. A primary requirement for this API was to be fully integrated into existing legacy systems to allow the deployment of this API in the majority of our operating regions.  This meant all upstream connected services needed to be altered for use with end clients where many of these systems were designed originally for internal use only. Collective requirements from existing and new system users were aggregated and all parties needed to approve of each change in order to progress through the project.  This API is private to view to clients only. An accompanied Postman collection + mock server is available to registered developers.

projects.name: Hosted Window Enhancements and Documentation
projects.description: My first project working for the payment company was improvement of the Hosted Window checkout. Working side by side with a single developer we rapidly tested different input field behaviours to provide the easiest data entry experience for the user. Following this release I was also tasked with improving the documentation for the feature.

projects.name: Olive U Naturally Shopify Website
projects.description: Product photography (Sofia) and Custom Shopify website (Matt).  Email marketing with Mailchimp and custom templates with an integration into the Shopify product line.  Initially we chose a website template which was then modified using the Liquid Syntax feature developed by Shopify. This allowed additional product details to be displayed and button functionality to be controlled based on values such as stock count or product color. CSS customisation and individual pages were edited/created to suit the needs of the client based on industry standards.  Implementation of the newly launched Shopify Pay along with custom email templates for checkout receipts and order fulfilment.

projects.name: Smart Home Implementation
projects.description: In order to broaden my knowledge of networking and IoT, I decided to invest heavily into a 100% local custom smart home infrastructure using the following principles:  - Local access and control for all systems - 3-2-1 Backup strategy - Parallel implementation/operation of security related systems - Hardwire first, wireless second  Networking Setup: - Unifi UDM Pro SE - Unifi Lite 16 PoE - Unifi Lite 8 PoE - Unifi Flex (2) - Unifi Flex Mini (5) - Fixed IP Fiber 1Gbps - Failover Backup 4G Connection - Wireguard VPN Server  Smart Heating: - NIBE F750 Air to Water Heat Pump - NibePi AI controlled heating curve and hot water over RS-485 serial to MODBUS - Uponor Zone Control  Smart Lighting and Shades: - Ikea Zigbee Hub (Channel 6) - 8 Ikea Smart Blinds - 15 Ikea Smart Bulbs - 3 Ikea Routers  Camera System: - 8 PoE powered IP camera for external observation - Unifi Protect for internal cameras - All cameras connected to Frigate, Blue Iris and Home Assistant directly and indirectly - Frigate 0.12 + TPU Coral running in Docker on Kali Linux - Blue Iris on Windows 11 dedicated machine with Code Project AI running on M1 mac for optimised Face and Person Detection  Home Assistant: - Running HassOs on dedicated SFF refurbished mini pc - Mqtt for connecting Frigate, NibePi etc... - AdGuard for custom DNS rewrites - Bitwarden local hosted password manager - Home Assistant SkyConnect with 6 routers and 20 end devices for door/window sensors combined with local-only Alarm system - Home Assistant Cloud access for Notifications when fiber outage occurs - iPhone shortcut notification when all access routes to Home Assistant no longer work (3 total) - HAN Port connection to electrical meter for real-time phase and voltage allows for overload protection when charging electric car - Customized charging scheduling with local OCPP control of charge box  Other Containers: - Obico Server for 3D printer AI failure webhook notifications - CUPS - Searxng for local search engine

volunteer.description: Rescuing abandoned and shelter dogs from Ireland and helping them find homes in Sweden. See https://hundarutanhem.se/
